Open Studio
Home/Original factory content
Original factory content

A production library made to be edited, layered and transformed.

The project includes local sounds and instrument patches so a new session starts with practical material immediately. The content is designed as a foundation for original production—not a locked loop player.

Factory WAV assets444Approximately 154.4 MiB of local source audio
Editable synth patches240Twenty categories with full parameter access
Offline ready100%Bundled under public/sounds for local playback
Library categories

Purpose-built material for modern beat production.

Use the browser panel to preview sounds, assign samples to tracks, apply kits, load synthesizer presets and keep working without leaving the session.

36 WAV files

Tuned 808 collection

Key-labeled sub basses with varied decay, harmonics and body for trap, drill, melodic rap and modern hip-hop.

132 WAV files

Drum one-shots

Original kicks, claps, snares, closed hats, open hats and percussion with multiple envelopes and tonal characters.

56 WAV files

Rhythm and melody loops

Song-starting rhythmic and melodic material designed to be layered, chopped, processed and rearranged.

48 WAV files

Textures and transitions

Atmospheres, noise beds, impacts, risers, sweeps and transition material for depth and arrangement movement.

60 WAV files

Wavetables and impulses

Source waveforms for synthesis experiments and impulse responses for browser convolution reverb spaces.

240 presets

Instrument patches

Original bass, lead, keys, pluck, pad, bell, vocal, motion and experimental synthesizer starting points.

Sound browser

Search, filter, preview and assign sounds directly to the selected track.

The library is organized for fast production decisions. Factory samples remain separate from instrument presets, and custom user patches are stored alongside the project.

Start creating

Turn a factory sound into your own instrument.

Assign a sample, tune it, shape its envelope, route it through the mixer, automate effects, or layer it with a custom synthesizer patch.

Open Sound BrowserDesign a Synth Patch
MusicStudioLabBrowser production workstation

Design original sounds, sequence patterns, arrange songs, mix channels, automate movement, and render WAV masters directly in a modern browser.
